name: Bread Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Stir together to distribute evenly.
3. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container.
4. Label the container with the contents and date.
5. Store in a cool, dry place.
6. Use within 6 to 8 months.
7. The mix makes about 22 cups of ready-to-use bread mix.
